attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT TMP.CISCO_BATCH_ID, TMP.ORDER_NUMBER, TMP.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, TMP.PO_NUMBER, TMP.SHIP_DATE, TMP.FREIGHT_CODE, 
TMP.DESCRIPTION, TMP.FREIGHT_TERM, TMP.FREIGHT_AMOUNT, TMP.HEADER_ID, TMP.SELLING_PRICE, TMP.ROUTING_OPTION, 
TMP.PRODUCT_FAMILY, TMP.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP, TMP.BUSINESS_UNIT, TMP.ACTUAL_SHIPSET_WEIGHT, TMP.DIM_WEIGHT, 
TMP.FREIGHT_BILLED, TMP.FREIGHT_PAID, TMP.THEATRE, TMP.SHIP_FROM_ORG, TMP.SHIP_TO_ORG, TMP.COGS_ACCOUNT, TMP.SYSTEM_WEIGHT, 
TMP.DESTINATION_CITY, TMP.SHIPPING_ZIP, TMP.SHIPPING_COUNTRY, TMP.RECEIPT_ZIP, TMP.RECEIPT_COUNTRY, TMP.RECEIPT_COMPANY, TMP.DEPARTMENT, 
TMP.SHIP_FROM_ID, TMP.SHIP_TO_ID, TMP.SHIPMENT_TYPE, TMP.CARTON_ID, TMP.CARTON_WEIGHT, TMP.FREIGHT_RATED, TMP.TRACKING_NUMBER, TMP.GL_FREIGHT, 
TMP.OTOR_PO_QUANTITY, TMP.REQUEST_ID, TMP.CREATED_BY, TMP.CREATION_DATE, TMP.LAST_UPDATED_BY, TMP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, TMP.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, TMP.MATCHING_FLAG, 
TMP.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, TMP.HOUSE_AIRWAY_BILL, TMP.INVOICE_DATE, TMP.INVOICE_NUMBER, TMP.RUN_DATE, TMP.SERVICE_LEVEL, TMP.SHIP_FROM_REGION_CODE, 
TMP.SHIP_FROM_NAME, TMP.SHIP_TO_NAME, TMP.SJ_ACTIVITY_ID, TMP.SHIP_TO_REGION_CODE, TMP.ACTIVITY_ID, TMP.CISCO_IB_BATCH_ID,TMP.ATTRIBUTE1, TMP.ATTRIBUTE2, TMP.ATTRIBUTE3, 
TMP.ATTRIBUTE4, TMP.ATTRIBUTE5, TMP.ATTRIBUTE6, TMP.ATTRIBUTE7, TMP.ATTRIBUTE8, TMP.ATTRIBUTE9, TMP.ATTRIBUTE10, TMP.ATTRIBUTE11, TMP.ATTRIBUTE12, 
TMP.ATTRIBUTE13, TMP.ATTRIBUTE14, TMP.ATTRIBUTE15, TMP.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, 'CG' AS GLOBAL_NAME,TMP.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, TMP.REFRESH_DATETIME , TMP.FREIGHT_TYPE,TMP.FREIGHT_PLANNED
FROM
(SELECT 
CISCO_BATCH_ID, ORDER_NUMBER,SHIP_SET_NUMBER, PO_NUMBER, SHIP_DATE, FREIGHT_CODE, 
DESCRIPTION, FREIGHT_TERM, FREIGHT_AMOUNT, HEADER_ID, SELLING_PRICE, ROUTING_OPTION, 
PRODUCT_FAMILY, TECHNOLOGY_GROUP, BUSINESS_UNIT, ACTUAL_SHIPSET_WEIGHT, DIM_WEIGHT, 
FREIGHT_BILLED, FREIGHT_PAID, THEATRE, SHIP_FROM_ORG, SHIP_TO_ORG, COGS_ACCOUNT, SYSTEM_WEIGHT, 
DESTINATION_CITY, SHIPPING_ZIP, SHIPPING_COUNTRY, RECEIPT_ZIP, RECEIPT_COUNTRY, RECEIPT_COMPANY, DEPARTMENT, 
SHIP_FROM_ID, SHIP_TO_ID, SHIPMENT_TYPE, CARTON_ID, CARTON_WEIGHT, FREIGHT_RATED, TRACKING_NUMBER, GL_FREIGHT, 
OTOR_PO_QUANTITY, REQUEST_ID, CREATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, MATCHING_FLAG, 
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, HOUSE_AIRWAY_BILL, INVOICE_DATE, INVOICE_NUMBER, RUN_DATE, SERVICE_LEVEL, SHIP_FROM_REGION_CODE, 
SHIP_FROM_NAME, SHIP_TO_NAME, SJ_ACTIVITY_ID, SHIP_TO_REGION_CODE, ACTIVITY_ID, CISCO_IB_BATCH_ID,ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE3, 
ATTRIBUTE4, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7, ATTRIBUTE8, ATTRIBUTE9, ATTRIBUTE10, ATTRIBUTE11, ATTRIBUTE12, 
ATTRIBUTE13, ATTRIBUTE14, ATTRIBUTE15,SOURCE_DML_TYPE, TRAIL_FILE_NAME, SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, REFRESH_DATETIME,FREIGHT_TYPE,FREIGHT_PLANNED
FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_FREIT_ACTIVITY
WHERE SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'   
AND 
(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' AND SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME < '$$EndLastExtractDate')
) TMP
QUALIFY RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY TMP.ACTIVITY_ID ORDER BY TMP.ACTIVITY_ID,TMP.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
